Guests:

Fri Aug 9, 2024

45:30

Todd concludes the conversation that bleeds over from the first hour in regards to baloney attacks on the military service of the presumptive Democratic Vice Presidential nominee, Tim Walz with listener reactions through calls and texts.Then, Luke Mathers joins Todd while producer Aaron Zommers is on a well deserved vacation. Todd and Luke suggest what type of events would be featured at a Wisconsin-exclusive Olympic Games. We take calls and texts from listeners around the state of Wisconsin for ideas, including cribbage, cow-chip tossing, corn detasseling and more!Peter Rapine ofebaumsworld.comjoins the show for his biweekly visit to discuss wacky headlines from around the country, and this week around the world! From veryFlorida-specific storm problemsto Olympic mishaps on the pole vaulting course toRoombas gone wrong, you won't believe these true stories from the week!The Todd Allbaugh Show is a part of the Civic Media radio network and airs Monday through Friday from 12 - 2 pm across Wisconsin. Subscribe to the podcast to be sure not to miss out on a single episode! To learn more about the show and all of the programming across the Civic Media network, head over tohttps://civicmedia.us/showsto see the entire broadcast line up. Follow the show onFacebook,XandYouTubeto keep up with Todd and the show!

Todd concludes the conversation that bleeds over from the first hour in regards to baloney attacks on the military service of the presumptive Democratic Vice Presidential nominee, Tim Walz with listener reactions through calls and texts.

Then, Luke Mathers joins Todd while producer Aaron Zommers is on a well deserved vacation. Todd and Luke suggest what type of events would be featured at a Wisconsin-exclusive Olympic Games. We take calls and texts from listeners around the state of Wisconsin for ideas, including cribbage, cow-chip tossing, corn detasseling and more!

Peter Rapine ofebaumsworld.comjoins the show for his biweekly visit to discuss wacky headlines from around the country, and this week around the world! From veryFlorida-specific storm problemsto Olympic mishaps on the pole vaulting course toRoombas gone wrong, you won't believe these true stories from the week!

The Todd Allbaugh Show is a part of the Civic Media radio network and airs Monday through Friday from 12 - 2 pm across Wisconsin. Subscribe to the podcast to be sure not to miss out on a single episode! To learn more about the show and all of the programming across the Civic Media network, head over tohttps://civicmedia.us/showsto see the entire broadcast line up. Follow the show onFacebook,XandYouTubeto keep up with Todd and the show!
